Experience
Building data infrastructure — cloud-native, automated, production-ready
Data Engineer
Betagro Group
Mar 2025 – Present · Bangkok
  • Designed and implemented an end-to-end CI/CD pipeline for Azure Synapse Analytics notebook deployment using Azure DevOps, Azure Functions, YAML automation, and Synapse REST API — eliminating all manual deployment steps.
  • Automated production deployment of 60 Synapse notebooks per run in under 3 minutes, significantly improving release efficiency and reliability for the data team.
  • Built and documented a centralized GCP Dataform framework integrated with Azure DevOps Git — supporting collaborative development, code traceability, reusable templates, and production backup.
  • Developed ETL pipelines and migrated legacy SQL views using Azure Data Factory and SSMS; built Power BI dashboards and Microsoft Fabric Dataflows to support business reporting and BI.
  • Diagnosed and resolved a complex Azure ARM RBAC vs. Synapse RBAC permission conflict by identifying the root cause and applying the correct data-plane access control in Synapse Studio.
  • Delivered internal knowledge-sharing sessions on GCP Dataform architecture and Apache Airflow / Cloud Composer, strengthening team capability and engineering practices adoption.
  • Configured and tested Apache Airflow DAGs on GCP Cloud Composer for notebook orchestration as a workflow automation proof-of-concept.
  • Performed data validation and quality checks on reporting datasets to ensure production readiness and reliable BI usage.

GDG Bangkok (Google Developer Groups)

  • Core team member organizing DevFest, Build with AI Bangkok, and GDG events — handling logistics, speaker coordination, and community communications.
  • Designing event content, slides, and visual materials for GDG sessions and community outreach.
  • Speaker at FOSSASIA Summit 2026 Community Day — presented "Apache Airflow 101 with Cloud Composer" in English to an international open-source audience.

LoxleyOrbit Public Company Limited

  • Supported project owners and business stakeholders with real-time reporting visibility to improve monitoring and planning of investment projects.
  • Coordinated data requirements between business users and technical teams to ensure reporting outputs aligned with operations.

Projects
Things I've built — at work, for the community, and just to learn
CI/CD Pipeline for Azure Synapse
Betagro · 2025
  • Full automation of Synapse notebook deployments: Azure DevOps Service Hook → Azure Function → YAML Pipeline → Synapse REST API. Deploys 60 notebooks per run in under 3 minutes. Resolved ARM vs. Synapse RBAC permission issues and jq metadata stripping edge cases.
GCP Dataform Framework
Betagro · 2025
  • Centralized Dataform framework with Git-based CI/CD (Azure DevOps), reusable SQLX templates, Medallion Architecture design (Bronze/Silver/Gold), and production-ready backup practices. Deployed to production.
Apache Airflow POC on Cloud Composer 2
Betagro · 2025
  • Configured and tested Airflow DAGs on GCP Cloud Composer 2 to orchestrate notebook execution as a workflow automation proof-of-concept. Remained POC due to management direction.
Automated Online Retail ETL Pipeline
Personal Project · GCP · github ↗
  • Designed and implemented a fully automated ETL pipeline on GCP to process raw e-commerce transaction data and produce analytics-ready datasets in BigQuery.
  • Used Python, Pandas, SQL, Apache Airflow, Cloud Composer, GCS, and BigQuery — automating scheduling, data cleaning, deduplication, null handling, type casting, and feature engineering.
ETL Pipeline for Bank Marketing Campaign Data
Personal Project · GCP · github ↗
  • Built an end-to-end ETL pipeline on GCP using Python, Pandas, Jupyter Notebook, Cloud Storage, and BigQuery.
  • Extracted, cleaned, transformed, and loaded marketing campaign data while enforcing schema compliance and data type validation for analytics usage.
